mapper.sql: id, title, category_id, difficulty, description, test_cases, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem (title, category_id, difficulty, description, test_cases, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{categoryId}, #{difficulty}, #{description}, #{testCases}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO problem (title, category_id, difficulty, description, test_cases, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.title}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.description}, #{item.testCases}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
